claims.evidence_text: the optimal concentration for treating the wheat seeds was obtained when BS Reglalg is diluted with water in the ratio of 1/200
claims.claim_summary: For winter wheat, the optimal pre-sowing seed treatment was the biostimulator Reglalg diluted in water at a ratio of 1:200.

claims.evidence_text: Before sowing the grains, we sprinkled seeds with 10 milliliters of water (control) or BS Reglalg diluted with water in a 1:200 (experiment) per 1 kilogram. Of grains, shade during 12 hours.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat seed treatment with biostimulator Reglalg was applied at 10 mL of 1:200 solution per 1 kg of grain, shaded for 12 hours before sowing.

claims.evidence_text: makes it possible to induce in plants a complex non-specific resistance to many diseases and resistance to adverse environmental factors
claims.claim_summary: Pre-sowing seed treatment with biostimulator Reglalg is reported to induce non-specific resistance to many diseases in wheat plants.

claims.evidence_text: We sowed the seeds of all varieties in the second half of October, mechanized at a depth of 6 cm.
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat (varieties Moldova 5, Kuialnik, Missia) was sown mechanically at a depth of 6 cm in the second half of October.

claims.evidence_text: We sowed the seeds of all varieties in the second half of October
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat in the Chisinau area (Moldova) was sown in the second half of October.
